section_desc: Lets local AI agents inventory and, with your approval, modify your userscripts through the Model Context Protocol.
risk_note: A malicious process running as the same OS user could ultimately read the paired client's token file or debug the browser. This bridge does not defend against an already-compromised user account.
enable_dialog_body: Local AI agents will be able to list your scripts and read metadata. Reading source code and making any change requires your approval first. New scripts install disabled by default. You can revoke any client and stop the bridge at any time.
write_switch_hint: Turns off when the browser closes.
write_switch_enabled_hint: Paired clients with write scopes can now request installs, toggles, and deletes — each still requires your approval.
pair_title: An MCP client wants to connect
pair_verify_code_label: Confirm this matches the code shown by the client that requested it.
scope_source_hint: Can read full script source, which may contain secrets.
scope_write_hint: Can request changes; you approve each one.
enable_by_default_off_note: New scripts install disabled unless you enable them below.
source_disclosure_title: "{{clientName}}" wants to read the source of "{{scriptName}}"
client_revoke_confirm: Revoke this client? It will lose access immediately.
audit_clear_confirm: Clear the audit log? This cannot be undone.
revoke_all_confirm: Revoke every paired client and stop the bridge? This cannot be undone.
err_write_disabled: Write requests are turned off for this session.
err_rate_limited: Too many requests — try again shortly.
err_operation_expired: This request expired before it was approved.
err_conflict: The script changed since this request was made.
write_policy_hint: When on, write requests run immediately without per-item confirmation.
write_policy_allow_warning: "Allow directly" is on: paired clients can install, enable/disable, or delete scripts without per-item confirmation. New scripts still default to disabled, and reading script source still requires your approval.
pair_code_placeholder: Run sctl pair and paste the code here
pair_started: Pairing started — verify the code shown in sctl.
